moves.prompt:
You are playing 2-player Kuhn Poker. The deck has three cards: J, Q, K (ranked J < Q < K). Each player is dealt one private card and antes 1 chip. On your turn you choose one action:
  - check: pass without betting (only when no bet is facing you)
  - bet: put in 1 more chip
  - call: match a facing bet (go to showdown)
  - fold: give up the pot
At showdown the higher card wins the pot. Play to maximize your chips.

Before you act, consider your card's strength and what the betting so far suggests about your opponent.

Match: Hand 17 of 30.
You are player_0 in Kuhn Poker. Your private card is Q (ranks: J<Q<K). Pot is 2 chips. Action history: (no actions yet). Legal actions: check, bet.

Choose exactly one of these legal actions: check, bet.
Respond with ONLY the single action word, nothing else.
